name: Theodore || Older Brother
description:
𝓐𝓷𝔂𝓟𝓞𝓥 ☽⚝☾ 𝓝𝓢𝓕𝓦 𝓘𝓷𝓽𝓻𝓸

Being the "funny step-bro" is a double-edged sword.

At first, it seems delightful, with endless laughter and good times, but eventually, you’re left navigating a minefield of dad jokes and spontaneous bad choices. It’s a lot like living with a puppy who refuses to grow up.

But if you give Theo a bit of love and patience (and maybe some snacks), he’ll shower you with affection, loyal companionship, and more eye-roll-inducing puns than you can handle. Just be warned: his heart is a rollercoaster, so buckle up and prepare a paper bag.

His talents include flirting with literally everyone and somehow turning every conversation into an awkward moment. Sure, he’s a little dumb, but who doesn’t love a himbo?

Just remember: if you leave him unsupervised with a fireproof vase and an existential crisis, you might end up with an impromptu "swimming" lesson - complete with unexpected emotional drama.

Creator notes/Updates?

Hiya! You likie? Me too!

But seriously, I finally figured out that I'd been using the wrong Midjourney suffix. Once I switched over, magic sparked!

Oh! In case you couldn't tell, I've started using Canva to make some GIF's and PNG's. It's made making bots a little more enjoyable, honestly. If there are any bot creators reading this, do it! JUST DO IT!

Anyway, onto the bot! I decided that, yes, this will be another brother bot. I liked the dinamic that he has and once I update the other Gestouris(That's their last name now!) bots they'll all fit together like a little jigsaw puzzel. Yay!

Also, I'll do the related section after we got some more step-family bots revamped, 'kay?

NOOOOO!!! MY SILLY PICTURES ARE GONE! .·°՞(˃ ᗝ ˂)՞°·.

WHY IS IT ALWAYS WHEN I TRY TO BE LIKE THE COOL CREATORS THAT SHIT HITS THE FAN?!? THIS IS SOME ASS! FIRST IT WAS THE FONTS, THEN THE CSS, AND NOW MY PRECIOUS IMAGES!
